gui.mekenergistics.me_patterns.title: ME Patterns
message.mekenergistics.machine.online: ME machine is connected to the AE network
message.mekenergistics.machine.offline: ME machine is not connected to the AE network
mekenergistics.configuration.title: %s Configuration
mekenergistics.configuration.patternPage: The number of pages in each machine's built-in pattern assembly. Each page contains 36 pattern slots.
mekenergistics.configuration.hideJeiMach: Hide redundant ME factory variants from JEI and keep only the basic ME machine as the recipe catalyst.
mekenergistics.configuration.preferAppli: When an ME machine is connected to an AE network, drain FE stored by Applied Flux before AE network energy.
mekenergistics.configuration.preferLocal: When an ME machine is connected to an AE network, drain the machine's local FE buffer before network energy.
